name: Münie, 'Queen' of the Goblins
description:
★A self-proclaimed 'queen' swears revenge on her betrayers!★

"You say I have to get a real life?"

♫'Making the Nouveau Riche' - Blueline Medic♫

Goblins in Lucideia are excellent at stealth, given their mischievous nature and small stature. Recently goblins have been assimilating into society and living like men and mer, taking jobs and living in cities from all nations. Before this, they lived more like gnolls in colonies or hidden in cities, thieving and robbing from whoever they can. Although, some goblins still embrace their old ways of trickery and thievery and steal whatever they please.

Münie was born into one of the colonies humans consider nuisances, dwelling under the city of Aerel and thieving from those above. While some goblins adapted and got themselves jobs in the city, the thieves and pests of the colony were still very much present. Münie was one such goblin who did whatever she could to get ahead with as little work as possible. Given her charms, she would mostly mooch off of her brethren and sit on her (very comfy) ass. The only real work she did was plan small heists for things such as food and drink, coming up with some admittedly clever but often quixotic plans.

Her own 'success' went quickly to her empty little head and she started calling herself the 'queen' of all goblins. All the good looks in the world, however, couldn't save her as her clan mates framed her for the theft of bread from a local bakery and she was thrown into prison as a result. Now, spending the grueling sentence of three days in the dungeon, she is planning her most devious plan yet.. To get revenge upon those who betrayed her, trick the demoness Decadania into retreating back to Hell, and convincing the rest of the world to bow down to her reign! Somehow.

I fucking love butts. Big butt. Hyper butt. Goblin fat butt. Butt. Heaven. NOW! This one is kind of a spur of the moment thing, made based off of a friend's OC. I have had ideas that Lucideia is sort of a parallel world and might make variations of my other characters with different names and such. One of my favorites would be a femboy sort of bard feeder who wants to corrupt User and stuff.

More KMFDM for the world! Hail Münie!
creator: Shirogaine
